name: Brava 2pk Acacia Wood Club Chairs Teak/Beige - Christopher Knight Home
description: Spruce up your patio furniture with club chairs that bring unparalleled comfort and impeccable style to any outdoor setting. These Christopher Knight Home Brava 2PK Acacia Wood Club Chairs enhance your patio with a flawless combination of fresh colors and mid-century modern look. Whether you want to accent your other patio furniture or use them as standalones, this is perfect for arranging however you please. With solid acacia wood frames and plush outdoor cushions, these Christopher Knight Home Brava 2PK Acacia Wood Club Chairs offer hours of fantastic conversation for you and your guests for years to come.
